In-page audit lite

Stealth Lightbeacon

Grouped issues, delta summary, and one-click rescan for the active tab.

Idle

Local backend settings

Configure a local or remote backend before rescanning. Stdin mode is useful for direct Python adapters.

Scan state will appear here.
Popup shell loaded outside the extension runtime. The interactive UI can still be validated in a browser, but scan actions require the extension environment.
Local-only default. The rescan flow uses the active tab plus the background service worker.
